Vonage Documentation
Welcome to Vonage API Developer Portal. Here you can find all the technical documentation for the APIs available as part of the Vonage Communication APIs Platform. Be sure to checkout our
steps to get started with Vonage APIs
section!
Featured products
Identity Insights
Provides real-time access to a broad range of attributes related to the carrier, subscriber, or device associated with a phone number.
RCS Messaging
The Messages API RCS channel supports both outbound messaging (messages sent from the business to the customer) and inbound messaging (messages sent from the customer to the business, in response to an outbound message).
Verify API
Authenticate your users and prevent fraud with our simple, easy-to-use API that removes the complexity of 2FA at a global scale.
Video API Unified
Build a custom video experience using advanced features.
All Vonage APIs and products
Jump to:
Essential Resources

Network Features
Messaging

Video

AI Tools
Essential Resources
Working with Vonage APIs
Fundamental concepts and tools for working with Vonage APIs.
Vonage API Dashboard
Learn how to navigate and use the Vonage API Dashboard, your hub for managing Vonage APIs and applications.
Vonage CLI
Programmatically manage applications, JWTs, and more with the Vonage CLI.
JWT Generator
Generate JWTs using our online tool.
Postman Collections
Explore, test, and integrate our APIs directly from Postman.
SDKs & Tools
View all of the Vonage SDKs and tools available to help you build with our APIs.
Voice Calls
Voice API
Create calls
, control calls in-progress, get information about previous calls.
In-app Voice
Build live voice communications into your
application.
SIP Trunking
Connect
to existing endpoints via the phone network and in-app voice.
Low Code/No Code
Vonage Business Cloud
Programmatically access data and manage features on your Vonage Business Communications (VBC) account.
AI Studio
Build complex
conversational flows
via a drag-and-drop interface.
Vonage Conversational Commerce, powered by Jumper.ai
Vonage Conversational Commerce, powered by Jumper.ai, brings AI-powered features to drive product consideration, convert sales, and increase revenue.
AI Tools
MCP Server
Communicate with tools through a standardized interface that lets AI agents safely use external APIs and capabilities.
Identity Insights
SIM Swap
Determine whether and when a SIM swap was last performed on an individual mobile phone number.
Device Swap
Retrieve information on any recent device change for a SIM paired to a mobile phone
Subscriber Match
Compare end-user data for a phone number with that on file with a network operator.
Location Verification
Verify the location of an end-user using cellular network positioning.
Format
Validation of a phone number's format and retrieval of information derived from it.
Original Carrier
Information about the network was initially assigned. Information based on the numbering plan prefix.
Current Carrier
Information about the network the number is currently assigned.
Roaming
Check the roaming status and country for a given device on a mobile network.
Reachability
Check the connectivity status for a given device, including if it is connected to the network for data, SMS, or both.
Video
Vonage Video API Unified (New)
Build a
custom video
experience using advanced features.
Video API (Tokbox Portal)
Embed high-quality video functionality into your web and mobile applications.
Product Enablement
Account & Subaccounts
Create a record for your application and configure authentication, callbacks, and settings.
Audit API
Get information about your Vonage
account activity
.
Fraud Defender
Secure your application against
fraudulent
traffic
Opt-Out Assist
Easily manage all facets of
opt-out compliance
for SMS and MMS traffic
Network Features
Device Location Retrieval
Retrieve the last known location of a SIM enabled device using cellular network positioning.
Messaging
Messages API
Multi-channel
messaging that integrates with:
SMS
Whatsapp
Messenger
Viber
MMS
RCS
Email
10 DLC Support
10DLC APIs allow you to register your brand, register a campaign and many more.
TFN Registration
Programmatically register and manage toll-free numbers.
Channel Manager
Manage various aspects of the messaging channels supported by the Vonage Messages API.
SMS API
Programmatically send and receive
SMS
messages.
Verify Identity
Verify API
Enable your applications with two-factor
authentication
.
Account Management
Application API
Create a record for your application and configure authentication, callbacks, and settings.
Numbers API
Provision
virtual numbers
around the globe to send or receive text messages and phone calls.
Reports API
Find
historical records
and messages by originating or destination phone number, dates and more.
Redact API
Delete data
from the Vonage platform.
Ready to start building?
Experience seamless connectivity, real-time messaging, and crystal-clear voice and video calls—all at your fingertips.

We would like to store cookies on your device to enhance site functionality, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. Please use the buttons below to accept or reject all optional cookies, or click “Cookie Settings” to customize the purposes for which we may store these cookies.
Cookie Settings
Reject Optional Cookies
Accept All Cookies
Your Opt Out Preference Signal is Honored
Privacy Preferences
This site uses cookies and similar tools, some of which are provided by third parties, to operate and improve our site, enable social media and other features, support our advertising and marketing, collect user data, IP address and online identifiers, referring URLs and other browsing information, and record user sessions. We and these third parties use this information to analyze and improve performance and usage, understand more about users, provide personalized experiences, and reach users with more relevant content and ads on this site and third-party sites. For more information, please see our privacy policy.
Vonage Privacy Policy
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to your actions which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but then, some parts of the site will not work.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies, some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details
Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is provided to us in an aggregated, anonymous format. If you do not allow these cookies, we will not know when you have visited our site and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. Those companies may use the cookies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

hits.title: New Vonage app to directly challenge Skype
Ericsson/Vonage: counting the cost of a poor call

analysis.name: Vonage
analysis.value_proposition: A developer-focused communications API platform enabling businesses to embed voice, video, messaging, and identity capabilities into any application.
analysis.ideal_customer: Developers and enterprises building programmable communications into applications, or businesses needing cloud unified communications with deep API access.

features.name: voice api
features.description: Create, control, and retrieve information on voice calls programmatically.
features.evidence_quote: Create calls, control calls in-progress, get information about previous calls.

features.name: in-app voice
features.description: Embed live voice communications directly into web or mobile applications.
features.evidence_quote: Build live voice communications into your application.

features.name: sip trunking
features.description: Connect to existing telephony endpoints via SIP and the public switched telephone network.
features.evidence_quote: Connect to existing endpoints via the phone network and in-app voice.

features.name: sms api
features.description: Programmatically send and receive SMS messages at scale.
features.evidence_quote: Programmatically send and receive SMS messages.

features.name: messages api
features.description: Unified multi-channel messaging API covering SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, and Email.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-channel messaging that integrates with: SMS, Whatsapp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email

features.name: whatsapp messaging
features.description: Send and receive WhatsApp messages through the Messages API.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-channel messaging that integrates with: SMS, Whatsapp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email

features.name: facebook messenger messaging
features.description: Send and receive Facebook Messenger messages through the Messages API.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-channel messaging that integrates with: SMS, Whatsapp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email

features.name: viber messaging
features.description: Send and receive Viber messages through the Messages API.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-channel messaging that integrates with: SMS, Whatsapp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email

features.name: mms messaging
features.description: Send and receive multimedia messages (MMS) through the Messages API.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-channel messaging that integrates with: SMS, Whatsapp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email

features.name: rcs messaging
features.description: Rich Communication Services messaging supporting outbound and inbound business-to-customer messaging.
features.evidence_quote: The Messages API RCS channel supports both outbound messaging and inbound messaging.

features.name: email messaging via api
features.description: Send email through the unified Messages API alongside other channels.
features.evidence_quote: Multi-channel messaging that integrates with: SMS, Whatsapp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email

features.name: verify api
features.description: Two-factor authentication and user verification API removing complexity of 2FA at global scale.
features.evidence_quote: Authenticate your users and prevent fraud with our simple, easy-to-use API that removes the complexity of 2FA at a global scale.

features.name: video api
features.description: Embed high-quality video functionality with advanced features into web and mobile applications.
features.evidence_quote: Build a custom video experience using advanced features.

features.name: sim swap detection
features.description: Determine whether and when a SIM swap was last performed on a mobile phone number.
features.evidence_quote: Determine whether and when a SIM swap was last performed on an individual mobile phone number.

features.name: device swap detection
features.description: Retrieve information on any recent device change for a SIM paired to a mobile phone.
features.evidence_quote: Retrieve information on any recent device change for a SIM paired to a mobile phone

features.name: subscriber match
features.description: Compare end-user data for a phone number with data on file with a network operator for identity verification.
features.evidence_quote: Compare end-user data for a phone number with that on file with a network operator.

features.name: location verification
features.description: Verify the location of an end-user using cellular network positioning.
features.evidence_quote: Verify the location of an end-user using cellular network positioning.

features.name: phone number format validation
features.description: Validate phone number format and retrieve information derived from the number.
features.evidence_quote: Validation of a phone number's format and retrieval of information derived from it.

features.name: original carrier lookup
features.description: Look up the network a phone number was originally assigned to based on numbering plan prefix.
features.evidence_quote: Information about the network was initially assigned. Information based on the numbering plan prefix.

features.name: current carrier lookup
features.description: Look up the network a phone number is currently assigned to.
features.evidence_quote: Information about the network the number is currently assigned.

features.name: roaming status check
features.description: Check the roaming status and country for a given device on a mobile network.
features.evidence_quote: Check the roaming status and country for a given device on a mobile network.

features.name: reachability check
features.description: Check whether a device is connected to the network for data, SMS, or both.
features.evidence_quote: Check the connectivity status for a given device, including if it is connected to the network for data, SMS, or both.

features.name: device location retrieval
features.description: Retrieve the last known location of a SIM-enabled device using cellular network positioning.
features.evidence_quote: Retrieve the last known location of a SIM enabled device using cellular network positioning.

features.name: 10dlc support
features.description: APIs to register brands and campaigns for 10-digit long code (10DLC) SMS compliance.
features.evidence_quote: 10DLC APIs allow you to register your brand, register a campaign and many more.

features.name: toll-free number registration
features.description: Programmatically register and manage toll-free numbers (TFN).
features.evidence_quote: Programmatically register and manage toll-free numbers.

features.name: virtual numbers
features.description: Provision virtual phone numbers globally for sending and receiving texts and calls via Numbers API.
features.evidence_quote: Provision virtual numbers around the globe to send or receive text messages and phone calls.

features.name: reports api
features.description: Query historical records and messages by phone number, date range, and other filters.
features.evidence_quote: Find historical records and messages by originating or destination phone number, dates and more.

features.name: redact api
features.description: Delete personal data from the Vonage platform for compliance purposes.
features.evidence_quote: Delete data from the Vonage platform.

features.name: audit api
features.description: Retrieve information about account activity for security and compliance auditing.
features.evidence_quote: Get information about your Vonage account activity.

features.name: fraud defender
features.description: Protect applications against fraudulent traffic on the Vonage platform.
features.evidence_quote: Secure your application against fraudulent traffic

features.name: opt-out assist
features.description: Manage opt-out compliance for SMS and MMS traffic across all channels.
features.evidence_quote: Easily manage all facets of opt-out compliance for SMS and MMS traffic

features.name: ai studio
features.description: Build complex conversational AI flows via a drag-and-drop no-code interface.
features.evidence_quote: Build complex conversational flows via a drag-and-drop interface.

features.name: conversational commerce
features.description: AI-powered commerce platform (via Jumper.ai) to drive product consideration, convert sales, and increase revenue.
features.evidence_quote: brings AI-powered features to drive product consideration, convert sales, and increase revenue.

features.name: vonage business cloud api
features.description: Programmatic access to data and features on Vonage Business Communications accounts.
features.evidence_quote: Programmatically access data and manage features on your Vonage Business Communications (VBC) account.

features.name: channel manager
features.description: Manage messaging channel configurations supported by the Vonage Messages API.
features.evidence_quote: Manage various aspects of the messaging channels supported by the Vonage Messages API.

features.name: application api
features.description: Create application records and configure authentication, callbacks, and API settings.
features.evidence_quote: Create a record for your application and configure authentication, callbacks, and settings.

features.name: subaccounts management
features.description: Create and manage subaccounts under a primary Vonage account.
features.evidence_quote: Create a record for your application and configure authentication, callbacks, and settings.

features.name: vonage cli
features.description: Command-line tool to programmatically manage applications, JWTs, numbers, and more.
features.evidence_quote: Programmatically manage applications, JWTs, and more with the Vonage CLI.

features.name: jwt generator
features.description: Online tool to generate JSON Web Tokens for Vonage API authentication.
features.evidence_quote: Generate JWTs using our online tool.

features.name: postman collections
features.description: Pre-built Postman collections to explore, test, and integrate Vonage APIs.
features.evidence_quote: Explore, test, and integrate our APIs directly from Postman.

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Standardized interface allowing AI agents to safely use Vonage external APIs and capabilities.
features.evidence_quote: Communicate with tools through a standardized interface that lets AI agents safely use external APIs and capabilities.

features.name: server sdks
features.description: Server-side SDKs for multiple languages to build Vonage API integrations.
features.evidence_quote: View all of the Vonage SDKs and tools available to help you build with our APIs.

features.name: client sdks
features.description: Client-side SDKs for building in-app voice and video into web and mobile applications.
features.evidence_quote: View all of the Vonage SDKs and tools available to help you build with our APIs.

features.name: framework libraries
features.description: Libraries for popular web frameworks to accelerate Vonage API integration.
features.evidence_quote: View all of the Vonage SDKs and tools available to help you build with our APIs.

features.name: identity insights
features.description: Real-time access to carrier, subscriber, and device attributes associated with a phone number.
features.evidence_quote: Provides real-time access to a broad range of attributes related to the carrier, subscriber, or device associated with a phone number.

differentiators: Network-level identity insights (SIM swap, device swap, subscriber match) powered by carrier relationships via Ericsson ownership
Unified multi-channel messaging API covering 7 channels (SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, Viber, MMS, RCS, Email) under one API
Low-code/no-code AI Studio for building conversational flows without engineering resources
MCP server enabling AI agents to safely use Vonage APIs — early AI-native tooling surface
Conversational commerce via Jumper.ai acquisition for full sales funnel within messaging channels
Global virtual number provisioning via Numbers API
Ericsson-backed global network reach and carrier-grade infrastructure

recent_ships.what: RCS Messaging added to Messages API as featured product
recent_ships.source: The Messages API RCS channel supports both outbound messaging and inbound messaging.

recent_ships.what: Video API Unified launched as new unified video experience
recent_ships.source: Vonage Video API Unified (New) — Build a custom video experience using advanced features.

recent_ships.what: MCP Server launched for AI agent integration
recent_ships.source: Communicate with tools through a standardized interface that lets AI agents safely use external APIs.
Ericsson Completes Acquisition of Vonage (HN headline)

praised: API platform breadth covering voice, video, messaging, and identity in one place
Developer documentation and SDK support across multiple languages
Global reach for virtual number provisioning
complaints: "Unlimited" minutes capped at 3000 minutes — 'Vonage: Unlimited minutes capped at 3000 minutes'
Security concerns raised: 'Hackers: Your Vonage Call is Owned'
Poor call quality perception: 'Ericsson/Vonage: counting the cost of a poor call'

free_tier.limits: Trial credits on signup; no persistent free tier with ongoing usage caps documented in sources

tiers.name: Mobile
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pricing page did not return content; tier details unavailable from scraped sources

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned no parseable content. Vonage UCaaS historically offers Mobile/Premium/Advanced seat-based tiers; API platform is usage-based (pay-per-message/minute/call). Actual tier prices unavailable from sources provided.

recent_hn.title: Show HN: We open sourced Vapi – UI included
Show HN: Dograh – voice agents that pick Recordings over TTS using LLM
